zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Bourne於1504年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特。她於1526年與John Burrough在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年在她的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Bourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Burn
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Born
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Helmut, Berthold, Frieda, Friedrich, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Jutta.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French borgne ‘one-eyed, squint-eyed’.

variants.name: Cockburn
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bournes
meanings: English: variant of Bourne with plural or post-medieval exrescent -s.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Bourne was born in 1504, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married John Burrough in 1526, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1577, in her hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bourneは1504年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた。1526年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでJohn Burroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bourne(은)는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 John Burrough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 그녀의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Bourne родилась в 1504 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Burrough в 1526 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1577 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
